title: ONZ Optimized
description: The perfect base modpack, built to supercharge your game’s performance.
body:
![ONZ Optimized Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe841ca1dfcc112df6aae1a37b188a50f52dce5c.png)

**ONZ Optimized** is the ultimate performance focused modpack, designed to give you the highest FPS straight out of the box.

With carefully selected mods dedicated solely to optimization, no extras, no fluff and it serves as the perfect lightweight base for building your own modpack.

**System Specs (Tested With & Without ONZ Optimized.):**

- CPU: AMD Ryzen 5 7600
- GPU: RTX 5060 6 GB
- RAM: 64 GB DDR5 @ 5200 MHz
- Storage: Western Digital Black SN850
- OS: Windows 11 (24H2)

**Statistics (These tests were run on the 1.20.1 Version on the Same Seed.):**
- Vanilla Minecraft → Average 632 FPS
- With ONZ Optimized → Average 1852 FPS

*Results will vary depending on added mods, settings, and system configuration. Although all testing was done on the base Minecraft Settings when loading each version.
